issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and incorrect. The effect requires: (1) looking at 5 cards from top of deck, (2) revealing up to 1 Sky Island type card, (3) adding it to hand, (4) placing rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only has a generic SearchDeck with no filter specification, no quantity limit, and no handling of remaining cards.
Filter must specify {Sky Island} type requirement. Current filter is 'Any' which allows any card to be searched.
Missing action to handle placement of non-selected cards at bottom of deck. The effect requires returning 4 cards (or fewer if fewer than 5 in deck) to bottom of deck in any order.
SearchDeck should be limited to up to 1 card. Current DSL has no quantity constraint specified.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Sky Island} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
